tasks.label: Build C++ Project
args: $compiler = if (Test-Path 'C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe') { 'C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe' } else { 'g++' }; if ($compiler -ne 'g++') { $env:PATH += ';C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin' }; $cppFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path '${workspaceFolder}\src' -Filter *.cpp -Recurse | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; if ($cppFiles) { Write-Host 'Compiling C++ files using' $compiler '...'; $cppArgs = @('-g', '-I${workspaceFolder}\include') + $cppFiles + @('-o', '${workspaceFolder}\bin\main.exe'); & $compiler @cppArgs; if ($?) { Write-Host 'Build successful!' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'Build failed with error code $LASTEXITCODE' -ForegroundColor Red; exit 1 } } else { Write-Host 'Khong tim thay file .cpp nao trong src/' -ForegroundColor Yellow }
tasks.detail: Biên dịch toàn bộ project C++
